E. coli Whole-Cell Simulation Comparison

Three-way comparison of vEcoli 1.0 (vivarium engine), vEcoli 2.0 (composite migration), and v2ecoli (pure process-bigraph). All use the same ParCa parameters, initial state, and biological process logic.
